Tracker Dokara:
There are 5 tiers for completing missions, which are determined by the time you spend completing them.
Grade Mission Completion Time
S-grade Below 4 min 30 sec
A-grade 4 min 30 sec - below 5 min
B-grade 5 min - below 5 min 30 sec
C-grade 5 min 30 sec - below 6 min
D-grade 6 min - below 7 min

Here is the rewards for each level!
* Tenacity Reward buff - Duration: 1 week - P./M. Accuracy increased - Weakness/Confusion/Strike/Paralysis/Infection/ Petrification/Pull/Danger/Zone Resistance increased - P. Atk./M. Atk./ P. Def./ M. Def. increased - XP/SP increased
GradeReward
S-grade Tenacity Reward Lv. 5Santiago's Royal Soup (100 pcs.)
A-grade Tenacity Reward Lv. 4Santiago's Royal Soup (80 pcs.)
B-grade Tenacity Reward Lv. 3Santiago's Royal Soup (60 pcs.)
C-grade Tenacity Reward Lv. 2Santiago's Royal Soup (40 pcs.)
D-grade Tenacity Reward Lv. 1Santiago's Royal Soup (20 pcs.)
